title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.520 - Interest as part of damages
text:
537.520.  Interest as part of damages. — The jury on the trial of any issue, or on any inquisition of damages, may, if they shall think fit, give damages, in the nature of interest, over and above the value of the goods at the time of the conversion or seizure.
(RSMo 1939 § 3657) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3267; 1919 § 4222; 1909 § 5430
